Neon Ninja Run
Chapters Modes Support App Store

Landscape arcade runner for iPhone and iPad

Neon Ninja Run

Dash as Kira through neon worlds, parry enemies at the last second, defeat bosses, and unlock premium skins, trails, kill effects, titles, and sound packs.

See the worlds
Parry combat Boss chapters Offline-friendly

Built for fast sessions

One thumb on survival, one eye on the next threat.

Reactive combat Attack, parry, combo, and trigger special abilities when the screen gets wild.
Progress that shows Upgrade Kira, earn rewards, unlock cosmetics, and make every run look different.
Arcade variety Story chapters, Quick Play, Time Attack, Survival, weekly events, and modifiers.

Five worlds, five moods

Every chapter should feel like a different run.

Rain, signs, rooftop pressure

Neon City

Start inside the electric skyline: parry close calls, chain attacks, and stay ahead of the city.

Ice, spikes, bright hazards

Frozen Tundra

Launch through crystalline lanes where timing and jump control matter more than raw speed.

Weather chaos, precision runs

Storm Nexus

Push through heavy storms, glowing pickups, and sudden danger while building combo momentum.

Boss pressure, petals, rituals

Sakura Gardens

Face a calmer world with sharper threats, from blossom storms to armored guardians.

Final light, high speed, finishers

Nexus Prime

The run becomes a spectacle of light, enemies, powers, and decisive late-run moments.

Modes and progression

Runs stay short. Mastery does not.

Story Chapters

Progress through Kira's world, unlock lore, and complete chapter objectives.

Quick Play

Jump into a fast run with upgrades, cosmetics, and your best reflexes.

Time Attack

Race courses like Sprint 100 and push clean execution for faster clears.

Survival

Hold the line through waves, hazards, and escalating pressure.

Run Modifiers

Add extra challenge for bigger rewards and harder runs.

Game Center

Climb leaderboards and chase eight achievements.

Premium cosmetics

Make Kira’s run yours.

Collect skins, trails, kill effects, emotes, titles, and sound packs. The premium shop is built around visible style, not hidden stats.

Skins Trails Kill Effects Emotes Titles Sound Packs

Ready to run?

Step into the neon and chase your cleanest run.

Neon Ninja Run

Fast action arcade running in neon worlds.
